feedback.text: I welcome the 2024 Fitness Check on Digital Fairness and its important efforts to evaluate and strengthen consumer protection in the digital environment. But i would like to make attention to a significant and growing sector that deserves more focused regulatory attention and that is to the video game industry. Gaps in the current regulation is affecting both adults and a vast growing number of minors engaged in online gaming. There is still a lack of clear understanding for players about unfair practices, and accountability between game developers, platforms, and publishers is often murky. Thank you for the opportunity to provide feedback on this important initiative.
